flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Michael's College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Saint Michael's College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saint Michael's College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (74.7% → 67.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Saint Michael's College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (68.9% vs 77.4%).
